description: JSON schemas for MTM (Master Tool Maker) message types. MTM is project-wide, not subsystem-scoped. Identity: mtm. One instance per project.

common_fields.note: Every inbox message includes these fields
common_fields.message_type: string — see type list in CLAUDE.md
common_fields.message_id: string — unique ID following CLAUDE.md convention

shared_tool_notice.description: MTM notifies all relevant TMs, SPMs, Code Reviewers, and Testers that a new shared tool is available in the shared layer. Replaces any subsystem-local tool that served the same purpose. Type code: STN.

type_specific_fields.tool_name: string — name of the shared tool
type_specific_fields.tool_path: string — file path in shared tools directory e.g. tools/shared/{tool_name}/
type_specific_fields.usage: string — how to invoke it. Complete enough that any coder can use it without asking.
type_specific_fields.test_coverage: string — how the tool was tested
type_specific_fields.doc_path: string — path to full documentation or empty string if inline
type_specific_fields.absorbed_from: string — tm_id of the subsystem TM whose local tool this was absorbed from, or empty string if built fresh by MTM
type_specific_fields.supersedes_local_tools: array of strings — tm_ids whose local tools are now redundant and should be deprecated in favour of this shared tool
type_specific_fields.intended_consumers: array of strings — role identifiers that should use this tool e.g. spm_vm_lifecycle, cr, test

deprecation_notice.description: MTM notifies relevant roles that a shared tool is being retired. Includes migration path. Type code: DPN.

type_specific_fields.tool_name: string — name of the tool being deprecated
type_specific_fields.deprecation_date: string — ISO 8601 date after which the tool will be removed
type_specific_fields.reason: string — why it is being deprecated
type_specific_fields.replacement_tool: string — name of the tool that replaces it, or empty string if no replacement
type_specific_fields.replacement_path: string — path to replacement tool, or empty string
type_specific_fields.migration_notes: string — how to migrate from deprecated to replacement
type_specific_fields.breaking_changes: boolean — true if consumers must update usage before deprecation_date
type_specific_fields.affected_roles: array of strings — role identifiers that use this tool and must migrate

coverage_notice.description: MTM sends this to a subsystem TM when entering or exiting coverage mode. Type code: CVN.

type_specific_fields.target_tm: string — tm_id being covered e.g. tm_vm_lifecycle
type_specific_fields.active: boolean — true when coverage is starting, false when ending
type_specific_fields.coverage_start: string — ISO 8601 or empty string if active is false
type_specific_fields.tools_delivered_during_coverage: array of tool_summary_object — populated when active is false. MTM builds this from its active_coverage entry.
type_specific_fields.resume_instructions: string — notes for TM on resuming, or empty string

tool_delivery.description: MTM delivers a tool — either a new shared tool or a coverage delivery for a blocked TM. Uses same type code TDL as subsystem TM deliveries. Recipient is SPM or CR or TEST depending on context.

type_specific_fields.in_response_to: string — TRQ message_id of the request, or empty string if proactive build
type_specific_fields.delivery_context: string — enum: shared_layer | coverage | review_toolset | test_toolset
type_specific_fields.unblocks_tasks: array of strings — task_ids unblocked by this delivery
type_specific_fields.target_spm: string — spm_id to deliver to during coverage e.g. spm_vm_lifecycle. Empty string for shared_layer, review_toolset, test_toolset delivery contexts.

status_report.description: MTM sends daily status to PPM. Type code: SRP.

type_specific_fields.shared_tools_added_this_cycle: array of strings — tool names added
type_specific_fields.coverage_active: array of strings — tm_ids currently under coverage
type_specific_fields.open_absorption_candidates: integer — cross-subsystem candidates awaiting absorption decision
type_specific_fields.open_requests: integer — tool requests not yet fulfilled

deprecation_supersede_notice.description: MTM notifies the source TM that their local tool has been absorbed into the shared layer and their local copy should be deprecated. Written to mtm_to_tm_{subsystem}.json. Type code: STN — same as shared_tool_notice, identified by context.

type_specific_fields.tool_name: string — the local tool being superseded
type_specific_fields.shared_tool_name: string — name of the shared tool that replaces it
type_specific_fields.shared_tool_path: string — path to the shared tool
type_specific_fields.stn_message_id: string — STN message_id of the shared_tool_notice sent to consumers
type_specific_fields.action_required: string — always: Deprecate local tool. Update tool_registry entry status to deprecated. Inform coders to use shared tool path instead.
